name: Chicken Jubilee
recipeIngredient: 1 16 Oz. Can Pitted Bing Cherries, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chickens in shallow pans (skin side up). Season and dribble with margarine.
2. Brown under medium heat of broiler.
3. In a bowl, combine remaining ingredients except wine and cherries. Mix thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture over chicken and cover entire pans with foil.
5. Bake for 1 hour at 325°F. Remove foil and add wine and cherries.
6. Bake for an additional 15 minutes, basting.
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
